title: Gimenez Intervals
description: VO2max using sustained sub-max and supra-max alternation
purpose: VO2max using sustained sub-max and supra-max alternation

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/3. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% through. This is your workout. Own it. 75% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 108%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 1:00 at 108-108% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Beginning strong. 1:00 at 108%. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First interval. Still optimistic. That'll change in about 1 minutes.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First interval: 1:00 at 108-108%. Settle in, don't overcook it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 11 minutes of threshold work done. Block 1/3. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 90% at 90-95 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Set 1: 4:00 at 90%. Every minute here makes you faster on race day.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1: 4:00 at 90%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 10 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 1:00 at 108%. You're building something here. Suffering is the price of admission.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 3/12. 9 to go. You've accumulated 5min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/12. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/12. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 108% for 1:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 1: 4:00 at 90%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 4:00 at 90%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 24% complete. Block 1/3. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: nothing was fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. 90% FTP, 90-95 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 5 of 12.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 5/12. 108% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 5/12. You're building something real here. 7 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2/3. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 5/12. You've accumulated 10min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 40% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 35 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 26 minutes in. 90% at 95-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 40% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 6 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 40% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 40% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 46% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 0min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 46% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 46% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 46% done. 108% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 47% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 30 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 31 minutes in. 90% at 95-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 47% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 4 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 47% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 47% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 5:00. Then 25min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 5:00. Then 25min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where you earn it. 3 more reps. Your legs are screaming. Good.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 9: 108% FTP. You're 40 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've done 20 minutes of hard work. You can do 3 more intervals. Believe it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 61% done. The good news: almost finished. The bad news: 3 intervals left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 9/12. 108% FTP × 1:00. Seated. 3 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 3/3. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 2 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 63% through session. Block 3/3. You've done 21min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 2 blocks to go. 20 minutes. This discomfort is temporary. The fitness is permanent.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% done. This is sustainable. Technically. If you redefine 'sustainable.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 3: 4:00 at 90%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 2 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're 69% through this session. The deep work happens now, when you're tired.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 11/12. 1:00 at 108%. Cadence: 85-90 rpm. Seated. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 69% through the session. Every pedal stroke is making you faster. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 69% done. 108% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 4:00 at 90%. Then 15min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 4:00 at 90%. Then 15min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 4:00 at 90%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. Then 15min to contemplate your life choices. 90% FTP.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 90% × 4:00. Give it everything. 15min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 76% done. 0 intervals left. 10 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 76% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 76% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 10 minutes total. You've got this.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 84% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 30min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 55 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 84% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
